tagline: The best pool service in the valley!

hero.headline:
37 Years of Pools Done Right on the
North Shore
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool for family fun, not weekend chores. Clean Sweep Pools has kept North Shore pools crystal clear since 1989 so families like yours can skip the chemicals and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, our IPSSA-certified crew handles every aspect of pool care so you never have to worry about a thing.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, and equipment checks every week. Your pool stays swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, heaters, filters, automation systems, salt cells, and plumbing. Most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal opening and winterization services that protect your investment through harsh Illinois winters and ensure a smooth start each spring.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: IPSSA-certified technicians deliver precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, crystal clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no guesswork.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Energy-efficient variable speed pumps, automation controls, LED lighting, and salt systems that can save you up to 90% on electricity costs.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance for hotels, HOAs, and community pools with full health department compliance and custom-tailored service plans.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will send a certified technician to inspect it at no cost. No pressure, no obligation, just honest recommendations.

steps.title: Get a Custom Care Plan
steps.description: Every pool is different. We design a maintenance plan tailored to your pool's size, equipment, and usage. Pentair-backed solutions included.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Our IPSSA-certified team handles everything on schedule. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready while you enjoy your weekends with family.

about.label: Why North Shore Families Trust Us
about.headline: 37 Years of Keeping Pools Pristine Across Lincolnshire
about.description: Founded in 1989 by Rob Winograd, Clean Sweep Pools has been the North Shore's go-to pool service for nearly four decades. Our technicians are IPSSA-certified water chemistry experts and Pentair Authorized Dealers who treat every pool like their own.

features.title: IPSSA-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician holds certification from the Independent Pool and Spa Service Association, ensuring expert-level water chemistry management.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: Pool Contractor License #1050767 and comprehensive insurance coverage give you complete peace of mind with every service visit.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and make it right at no charge. After 37 years, our reputation is our most valuable asset.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime with zero fees or contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will come back and redo it at no charge. We have built our reputation over 37 years by standing behind every visit, and we are not stopping now. Your pool will look the way it should, or we keep working until it does.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Lincolnshire and North Shore area are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent situations like green pools or equipment failures, we offer priority same-day or next-day response.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our North Shore clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you are away. You will receive a detailed service summary after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: What certifications do your technicians hold?
faqs.answer: All of our technicians are certified water chemistry experts through the Independent Pool and Spa Service Association (IPSSA). We are also a Pentair Authorized Dealer and hold Pool Contractor License #1050767.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool openings and closings for Illinois winters?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our seasonal opening and winterization services are specifically designed for the harsh Illinois climate. We protect your plumbing, equipment, and surfaces so your pool is ready to go each spring.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties and HOA pools?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service hotels, HOAs, vacation rentals, and community pools across the North Shore. Commercial clients receive customized maintenance plans and full compliance with local health department requirements.

testimonials.name: Verified Homeowner
testimonials.text: Rob is incredibly knowledgeable, professional, and honest. He is always responsive and goes above and beyond to make sure our pool is in perfect condition. Highly recommend Clean Sweep Pools to anyone looking for reliable pool service.

testimonials.name: North Shore Client
testimonials.text: We have been using Clean Sweep Pools for years and they never disappoint. The team is always on time, thorough, and our pool has never looked better. Their expertise in water chemistry is unmatched.

testimonials.name: HOA Manager
testimonials.text: Clean Sweep Pools handles all of our community pool maintenance with complete professionalism. They keep us fully compliant with health codes and the pool is always sparkling clean for our residents.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Perfect All Season?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation inspection from our IPSSA-certified team. 37 years of North Shore pool expertise, zero pressure, and honest pricing.
